content.problemStatement:
Chef decided to exercise by running somewhere from ShareChat. He chose three sets of points in a plane:


A set of NNN points (numbered 111 through NNN): for each valid iii, the iii-th of them has coordinates (ai,bi)(a_i, b_i)(ai‚Äã,bi‚Äã).
A set of MMM points (numbered 111 through MMM): for each valid iii, the iii-th of them has coordinates (ci,di)(c_i, d_i)(ci‚Äã,di‚Äã).
A set of KKK points (numbered 111 through KKK): for each valid iii, the iii-th of them has coordinates (ei,fi)(e_i, f_i)(ei‚Äã,fi‚Äã).
ShareChat has coordinates (x,y)(x, y)(x,y). Chef must choose one point (aj,bj)(a_j, b_j)(aj‚Äã,bj‚Äã), one point (ck,dk)(c_k, d_k)(ck‚Äã,dk‚Äã), and one point (el,fl)(e_l, f_l)(el‚Äã,fl‚Äã). Then, he starts running from ShareChat, visits the chosen points (aj,bj)(a_j, b_j)(aj‚Äã,bj‚Äã) and (ck,dk)(c_k, d_k)(ck‚Äã,dk‚Äã) in any order, and then runs to the point (el,fl)(e_l, f_l)(el‚Äã,fl‚Äã), where he finishes his run.

Help Chef find the minimum distance he has to run.
constraints: 0‚â§ai,bi‚â§1090 \le a_i, b_i \le 10^90‚â§ai‚Äã,bi‚Äã‚â§109 for each valid iii
0‚â§ci,di‚â§1090 \le c_i, d_i \le 10^90‚â§ci‚Äã,di‚Äã‚â§109 for each valid iii
0‚â§ei,fi‚â§1090 \le e_i, f_i \le 10^90‚â§ei‚Äã,fi‚Äã‚â§109 for each valid iii
the sum of N+M+KN+M+KN+M+K over all test cases does not exceed 15,00015,00015,000
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers xxx and yyy.
The second line contains three space-separated integers NNN, MMM and KKK.
The third line contains 2N2N2N space-separated integers a1,b1,a2,b2,‚Ä¶,aN,bNa_1, b_1, a_2, b_2, \ldots, a_N, b_Na1‚Äã,b1‚Äã,a2‚Äã,b2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,aN‚Äã,bN‚Äã.
The fourth line contains 2M2M2M space-separated integers c1,d1,c2,d2,‚Ä¶,cM,dMc_1, d_1, c_2, d_2, \ldots, c_M, d_Mc1‚Äã,d1‚Äã,c2‚Äã,d2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,cM‚Äã,dM‚Äã.
The fifth line contains 2K2K2K space-separated integers e1,f1,e2,f2,‚Ä¶,eK,fKe_1, f_1, e_2, f_2, \ldots, e_K, f_Ke1‚Äã,f1‚Äã,e2‚Äã,f2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,eK‚Äã,fK‚Äã.
content.outputFormat:
For each test case, print a single line containing one real number ‚Äï the minimum distance.

Your answer will be considered correct if its absolute or relative error does not exceed 10‚àí610^{-6}10‚àí6.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 1:


The black point is ShareChat,
Points from the first set are red.
Points from the second set are green.
Points from the third set are blue.
The black line corresponds to Chef's run.

Chef should run from (1,4)(1, 4)(1,4) to (3,1)(3, 1)(3,1), then to (2,0)(2, 0)(2,0) and then to (1,3)(1, 3)(1,3). The distance is 13+2+10‚âê8.1820424980\sqrt{13}+\sqrt{2}+\sqrt{10} \doteq 8.182042498013‚Äã+2‚Äã+10‚Äã‚âê8.1820424980.
Example case 2:
![](https://codechef_shared.s3.amazonaws.com/download/Images/NOV19/PHCUL/sample-2.jpg =240x303)
Chef should run from (6,4)(6, 4)(6,4) to (5,7)(5, 7)(5,7), then to (1,6)(1, 6)(1,6) and then to (0,7)(0, 7)(0,7). The distance is 10+17+2‚âê8.6995968482\sqrt{10}+\sqrt{17}+\sqrt{2} \doteq 8.699596848210‚Äã+17‚Äã+2‚Äã‚âê8.6995968482.
